name: discord-codex-relay
description: Launch a live Codex Discord relay from the current workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Run a workspace-local Codex relay through Discord.
interface.longDescription: Adds a workspace-local `codex-discord` launcher so a live Codex CLI session can be controlled through Discord while staying isolated to the current workspace and bot profile.
defaultPrompt: Show the relay status and logs for this workspace.
Register this workspace for Discord relay.
